body.u: When my exam results arrived through the post, I didn’t open the envelope, but thought about my plans. When I finally opened the envelope I saw I had done much better than I thought I would, and I thought again about my plans. I could stay on in the sixth year and try to gain what qualifications I required and then enter ‘The Royal Air Force’ or I could apply to ‘The Big Brother Movement’ and become a park/forest Ranger in Australia. I decided on the first one.
I stayed on in the Sixth Year and gained my five O’levels and joined the R.A.F I was an ‘Air Electronics Operator’ flying in Nimrod, Submarine Hunters.

I t was in the fifth year I had been in the R.A.F. when I met Cybil an Australian. I was on a courtesy visit to Australia and she was in ‘The Royal Australian Air Force’ as an ‘Assitantassistant Air Traffic Controller’. She was based on Tasmania and during our free time she showed me the sights of Tasmania, it was then that I fell in Love with her and the Forests of Tasmania.
I left the RAF a year later and emigrated to Tasmania and applied for the job of Forest Ranger, I got the job.

Cybil left the R.A.A.F six months later and came to Tasmania (she had eenbeen posted to Canberra just after I first met her) where we got married and settled down in the middle of the Forest. By now I was Twenty-Five, she was Twenty-three.

Two years later Cybil gave birth to our first son David {named after her father} and by this time I had obtained my Hellicoptershelicopter's pilot licence and had become well known around this area, that same year was the year of the ‘Great Fire’ which destroyed the ‘wooden’ village of ‘Montgomery-on-the-hill’.
A year after that Sybil gave birth to the twin, a three years later gave birth to Joyce.

Five years later Sybil died of Cancer and shock after one of the twins, Jill was killed in the mighty Tamu river. To get over the shock I went back to Britain to visit all my relations while the kids staryedstayed at CybilsCybil's mom and dad’s place in Melbourne. After two weeks David came over and then we both went back together.
To get away from the past I applied for a similar job in the USA which I didn’t get, I tried again six months later and succeeded and so we emigrated.
The next year my parents died in a car crash so flew over attended their funeral.
